'''Port''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Vorzydiak]] who was the [[Chairman/Legends|Chairman]] of [[Vorzyd IV]], in [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]]. He was the husband of [[Bryn (Vorzydiak)|Bryn]] and father of [[Grath (Vorzydiak)|Grath]].

During that year, Vorzyd IV suffered attacks on its factories. Chairman Port accused the people of [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]], which emerged to be a competitive [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. He told his problem to the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] and [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] were sent there to solve the problem. They finally discovered that was not Vorzyd V's fault, but the [[Freelies]]'. These actions got Vorzyd IV and Vorzyd V close to war, but finally Port met with [[Felana]], leader of Vorzyd V, to close down the misunderstanding. He was injured in an explosion caused by the Freelies, but was not mortally wounded.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Threat Within]]'' {{1st}}
